About Me

I'm a software engineer who believes good code is clear, deliberate, and kind to the people who read it. I work across the stack — from database schemas to shipping interfaces — and I care about the craft at every layer.

Outside of engineering, I'm drawn to photography. It's a different kind of problem-solving: one about light, composition, and patience. I find that the two disciplines — building systems and capturing images — complement each other surprisingly well.

Languages

TypeScript JavaScript Python Go Rust HTML & CSS SQL Bash

Tools & Frameworks

React Next.js Astro Node.js FastAPI Docker Git PostgreSQL AWS Tailwind CSS Figma

Get in touch

Open to interesting conversations — reach me at mark@example.com
